title: eucommiaceae
intro: The Eucommiaceae rank is a botanical family classification, denoting a group of flowering plants. It is a specific level of taxonomic ranking that groups plants with shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships. Eucommiaceae is a relatively small family, consisting of a single genus, Eucommia, commonly known as the Chinese thuja or spindle tree. The Eucommiaceae family is native to China and parts of Southeast Asia, and is characterized by its unique combination of leaf and cone morphology.
